resources.title: Rawkode Academy Courses Repository
resources.evidence_quote: we have the new workshop pushed to the Rawkode Academy slash courses repository on github.com. You will find a directory called eight kubernetes with the README that we will be using for today's session.

resources.title: Artifact Hub
resources.evidence_quote: The Teleport charts are not published through the Artifact Hub. If you're not familiar with the Artifact Hub, there we go, Artifact Hub. This is like the new Helm Hub or even a replacement or discovery mechanism

resources.title: Emissary Ingress
resources.evidence_quote: I'm a fan of emissaries, so I just swapped out. What that means is... we have our ambassador, which is Emissary NGRIS, as a load balancer

resources.title: Kubernetes Office Hours
resources.evidence_quote: Carlos and I are hosting the Kubernetes office hours tomorrow. That is at two p. M. GMT.
